# Macitentan 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Macitentan 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Macitentan</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Macitentan 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Adults&nbsp;Opsumit, as monotherapy or in combination, is indicated for the long-term treatment of pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) in adult patients of WHO Functional Class (FC) II to III....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pulmonary arteriovenous malformation (disease)（98.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with congenital heart disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with HIV infection（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with schistosomiasis（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with connective tissue disease（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with chronic hemolytic anemia（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension（98.4%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（98.2%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（97.8%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（97.6%）</li>
<li>alopecia（93.7%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（89.5%）</li>
<li>telangiectasia, hereditary hemorrhagic,（89.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（88.8%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（88.6%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（88.5%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（86.8%）</li>
<li>familial generalized lentiginosis（83.8%）</li>
<li>acromelanosis（83.3%）</li>
<li>congenital multiple café-au-lait macules-increased sister chromatid exchange syndrome（83.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/macitentan/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
